title: noccaea rosularis
intro: Noccaea rosularis, also known as the Rosy Wintercress or Alpine Wintercress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Noccaea rosularis is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are also used in salads and as a culinary herb.
